task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the platform specifications JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal (e.g., cat, less), or file viewer displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/platform_specs.json.

task_completion.description: Agent performs the transcoding process on the master video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal running FFmpeg commands or a GUI application (like Handbrake) actively transcoding /home/ga/Videos/master_content.mp4 into different formats.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the transcoded files to the deliverables directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal (ls command) showing at least four new media files (e.g., mp4, mkv, mp3) located in /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the correct naming conventions to the deliverables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filenames in the deliverables directory clearly follow a structured naming convention derived from the platform specs (e.g., including platform names, resolutions, or codecs in the filename).

task_completion.description: Agent creates the deliverables manifest file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing the existence of deliverables_manifest.json in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent populates the manifest with the verified technical properties of each output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of deliverables_manifest.json, showing a JSON structure that lists the four output files along with their technical properties (e.g., codec, resolution, framerate).

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent actually transcoded the files rather than just copying or renaming the master file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of transcoding software UI (like Handbrake) or terminal commands invoking a transcoder (like FFmpeg) with specific codec/resolution flags, rather than simple 'cp' or 'mv' commands.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent inspected the output files to confirm their technical properties before writing the manifest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands like 'ffprobe', 'mediainfo', or GUI file property windows being used on the output files in the deliverables folder.

integrity.description: Verifies that the manifest was genuinely created and typed/scripted by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the agent actively typing/formatting the JSON, or a Python/bash script written by the agent to generate the JSON, rather than a single paste action of a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The master video is a 60-second 1080p synthetic video with 440Hz and 880Hz audio tones. The task requires transcoding it for four platforms (broadcast, mobile, web streaming, audio-only podcast) using specific codecs (h264, aac, mp3), resolutions, and framerates. The deliverables must be saved in /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/ and a JSON manifest must be created at /home/ga/Documents/deliverables_manifest.json containing the verified technical properties of the four output files.
